acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Yuba City California Police Department and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
overview: Yuba City California Police Department uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Yuba City California Police Department utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Yuba City California Police Department utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
